examples: Oranges can be kept for a long time without getting mouldy.
If one apple goes mouldy, will that make the others rot too?
Which? reviewed hygiene inspection reports for 50 hospitals and found evidence of cockroaches, mice and mouldy cooking equipment.
The staircase of the crumbling, concrete housing block was pickled in the old acrid odours - cats, cooking fat, mouldy potatoes.
